rationale: Implementation takes the preferred CSS-variable override path: a single `website/assets/css/custom.css` retints Hextra's primary HSL scale to DDx `#4878C6` and exposes the full DESIGN.md token set as `--ddx-color-*` for downstream layouts. The commit message records that `hugo --minify` was used to verify the fingerprinted `main.min.css` picks up the override after Hextra's defaults, and the partial-fallback (secondary/tertiary not piped into Tailwind utilities) is documented inline with rationale. Minimal, on-spec, no scope creep.
